questions.prompt: Какая фраза правильно использует Present Perfect для открытого периода времени?

choices.text: I had a meeting this morning.
I have had a meeting this morning.
I will have a meeting this morning.
I have a meeting this morning.

questions.explanation: «This morning» — открытый период, поэтому Present Perfect используется.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза верно использует Past Simple для завершенного периода?

choices.text: I have visited Paris this year.
I visited Paris last year.
I have visited Paris last year.
I visit Paris every year.

questions.explanation: «Last year» — закрытый период, поэтому Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильную форму для предложения: «Она не получила звонков сегодня».

choices.text: She didn't get calls today.
She hasn't got calls today.
She didn't have calls today.
She hasn't had calls today.

questions.explanation: «Today» — открытый период, поэтому Present Perfect используется в отрицании.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза правильно использует Past Simple для завершенного времени?

choices.text: I have read this book this week.
I read this book last week.
I have read this book today.
I read this book every day.

questions.explanation: «Last week» — закрытый период, поэтому Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза верно использует Present Perfect с «this morning»?

choices.text: I had breakfast this morning.
I have had breakfast this morning.
I will have breakfast this morning.
I have breakfast this morning.

questions.explanation: «This morning» — открытый период, поэтому Present Perfect.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза правильно использует Present Perfect для открытого периода?

choices.text: I finished my homework yesterday.
I have finished my homework this evening.
I finished my homework last night.
I will finish my homework tonight.

questions.explanation: «This evening» — открытый период, поэтому Present Perfect.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза верно использует Past Simple для завершенного периода?

choices.text: She has traveled to London this month.
She traveled to London last month.
She has traveled to London today.
She travels to London every month.

questions.explanation: «Last month» — закрытый период, поэтому Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза правильно использует Present Perfect в отрицании для открытого периода?

choices.text: I didn't receive any emails this week.
I haven't received any emails this week.
I didn't receive any emails last week.
I haven't received any emails last week.

questions.explanation: «This week» — открытый период, поэтому Present Perfect используется в отрицании.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза верно использует Past Simple для завершенного времени?

choices.text: He has finished his project this week.
He finished his project last week.
He has finished his project yesterday.
He finishes his project every week.

questions.explanation: «Last week» — закрытый период, поэтому Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какая фраза правильно использует Present Perfect для открытого периода?

choices.text: They had a meeting this morning.
They have had a meeting this morning.
They will have a meeting this morning.
They have a meeting this morning.

questions.explanation: «This morning» — открытый период, поэтому Present Perfect.
